18. SESSION TRANSITIONS: When a task is marked done, Flow never snaps coldly back to the plain task list.
The Micro-Transition
Duration: 1.2 to 1.8 seconds. Dismissable by tapping anywhere.
Checkmark fills with section atmosphere color (200ms)
Title strikes through and fades to 60% (200ms)
Inline prompt appears below the completed task (300ms fade in)
Prompt options:
If next task exists in same section:
"Up next: [next task title]"
[ Start ]  [ Skip ]
If current section is now empty:
"Morning done."   <- Fraunces 18px, section atmosphere color glow for 1.5s
"Afternoon has 3 tasks waiting."
[ Continue ]
If all tasks for the day are complete:
"Everything done."   <- Fraunces 22px
"How did today feel?"
[ Good ]   [ Okay ]   [ Rough ]
(These responses are not stored or analyzed. They only affect the language in the review summary.)
If it is late with tasks remaining:
"That is one less thing."
[ Keep going ]   [ Carry rest forward ]
Rules for Session Transitions
The prompt auto-dismisses after 4 seconds if not interacted with
Tapping anywhere outside dismisses it instantly
Never blocks the UI — appears inline, not as a modal
Always contextual — the prompt matches the real state of the day
"What next?" energy, not "congratulations" energy
This is continuation, not celebration
Focus Mode Completion Transition
When a task is marked done inside Focus Mode:
Ambient background shifts slightly (200ms hue rotation toward cooler tones)
Task title fades
Full-screen calm prompt appears:
"Done."
[ What next? ]   [ Take a break ]   [ Return to plan ]
"What next?" → immediate transition to next task in Focus Mode
"Take a break" → optional break timer (5 or 10 min, with calm countdown)
"Return to plan" → fade exit from Focus Mode back to the plan
19. FOCUS MODE (/focus/:taskId): Full screen. All chrome hidden. Sacred space.
Entry Points
Long press on any task → enters Focus Mode immediately
Swipe left on task → action menu → Focus option
Task expanded view → Focus button
Week tab (when task is active) → tapping Focus tab
Visual Design
[ambient gradient background — slow breathing]
[soft vignette edges — CSS radial gradient]
Deep work
feature build
(Fraunces 36px weight 300, centered)
[ 📁 Work ]
(category pill, small, centered)
remaining
(JetBrains Mono 72px + DM Sans 13px)
(3px progress arc, --accent fill, smooth)
[ Pause ]          [ Done ]
elapsed: 11m 28s              ⏱
Background
Ambient gradient that slowly breathes (CSS keyframe, 6s cycle, ±2% scale)
Gradient color matches current time of day (morning amber, night violet)
Soft vignette: radial gradient from transparent center to --bg-base edges
Never distracting — the task is always the most prominent element
Timer (Optional — user activates by tapping ⏱ icon)
Pomodoro presets:
Classic: 25 min work / 5 min break
Long Focus: 50 min work / 10 min break
Deep Work: 90 min work / 20 min break
Custom: drag a dial (circular) or type any value from 1 to 180 minutes
The dial is full-screen radius, draggable smoothly
No fixed steps — any minute value is valid
Elapsed timer always runs regardless of whether countdown is active.
Elapsed time is displayed at bottom of focus screen.
When countdown timer reaches zero:
Soft vibration (haptic)
Soft sound (gentle chime, respects system silent mode)
Inline prompt: "Nice work. Take a break?" — not a popup
Break timer options: 5 min or 10 min (both dismissable)
No aggressive modal, no confetti, no loud celebration
Exit
Tap back arrow (appears as a subtle chevron top-left, 20% opacity until hovered)
Completing the task (see Section 18 — Focus completion transition)
The Focus Mode exit is always a calm fade — never a jarring jump
Accessibility: Focus Mode uses role='application'. Surrounding UI gets aria-hidden='true'. Escape exits focus mode. Timer controls have proper aria-valuenow, aria-valuemin, aria-valuemax.
